nasb.text: Leah likewise came near with her children, and they bowed down; and afterward Joseph came near with Rachel, and they bowed down.

esv.text: Leah likewise and her children drew near and bowed down. And last Joseph and Rachel drew near, and they bowed down.

cnv.text: 利亞和她的孩子也上前下拜，隨後，約瑟和拉結也上前下拜。

ccb.text: 利亚也和她的孩子上前下拜，最后约瑟和拉结也上前向以扫下拜。

csbs.text: 接着莉亚和她的孩子们也上前下拜，最后约瑟和瑞秋也上前下拜。
